race.comment: DUPLI KATE (4) disappointed fresh on her home track but was better last time at Rosehill without threatening. Nearing her peak now and will find this much easier. Can put it all together today. ASTUNNER (2) gave a bold sight in front in the slop at Canterbury but dropped out quickly in the straight. Better suited back to this level and gets the key booking of Loy from a good draw. Can bounce back sharply. FUTURE FUND (7) bounced back to somewhere near his best last start when taking over at the turn and stretching out to win well here. Has been freshened with 46 days, kept up to the mark with a solid trial here. Goes well on the home track and gets a good chance to make it two on the bounce. PRESIDES (1) has been mixing his form this campaign but his two wins have rated well. Keeps a claimer on to aid the big weight. Right up to this on his best. MATHRIN (8) made a mess of them here two back in the slop before going amiss last time. Keeping safe.
